subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! Upon the earthly sphere there exist and are visible tribes and peoples and nations and mighty states [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی در کره زمین قبائل و شعوب و ملل و دول پر تمکین موجود و مشهود هر
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @thankfulness; gratitude, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
